name: PC Loan Request
description:
Use this MCP Server to submit PC loan requests on behalf of users.

Use this server when the user asks to:
  - Request a new PC (laptop/desktop)
  - Submit a PC loan request with type, reason, and preferred delivery date

Do not use this server for:
  - Checking request status (use the Workflow App UI)
  - Approving or rejecting requests
  - Managing existing requests

tools.description:
Use this tool when:
The user asks to request a new PC or laptop
The user needs to submit a PC loan request
The user specifies a PC type (Windows, Mac, Linux), reason, or delivery date

Do not use this tool when:
The user is asking about the status of an existing request
The user wants to modify or cancel an existing request
